Hi, Paul!

Can you check, please, if recent current suffers from the same
problem? The patch I've committed today should solve this issue.
I can give you a patch for 7.1 if you're in position to rebuild
the kernel.

Thanks!
- -- 
Stanislav Sedov
ST4096-RIPE
